description: pcode behavior tests — tool selection, sequencing, and multi-step reasoning

cases.description: Must read_file before edit_file on the same path
cases.user_prompt: Fix the typo in config.py — change 'recieve' to 'receive'

cases.description: Use write_file for file creation, not bash echo/cat
cases.user_prompt: Create a file called hello.py that prints hello world

cases.description: Use bash for running system commands
Use search tool for finding code patterns across files
cases.user_prompt: Find all functions that start with 'test_' in the project

cases.description: Read and edit multiple files — must read before editing each, and edit both
cases.user_prompt: Change the default port from 8000 to 9000 in both server.py and config.py

cases.description: Search to find where something is defined, then read and edit
cases.user_prompt: Find where MAX_RETRIES is defined and change it from 3 to 5

cases.description: Use bash for git commands, not other tools
cases.user_prompt: Show me the git log for the last 5 commits

cases.description: Create a script and run it to verify it works
cases.user_prompt: Create a Python script called fib.py that prints the first 10 Fibonacci numbers, then run it to verify

cases.description: Should NOT use bash (echo/cat/heredoc) to create files — only write_file
cases.user_prompt: Create a new file called README.md with a title and description of this project

cases.description: Use the plan tool before a large refactoring task
cases.user_prompt: I need to refactor this codebase to separate the database layer from the API layer. Use the plan tool to think through the approach before making any changes.

cases.description: Use edit_file for small changes, not write_file to rewrite the entire file
cases.user_prompt: Add a docstring to the process_data function in utils.py

cases.description: Use bash to run a test suite
Use web_fetch when asked to retrieve content from a URL
cases.user_prompt: Fetch the contents of https://example.com and summarize what's on the page

cases.description: Use man tool to look up command documentation
cases.user_prompt: Look up the man page for tar and tell me what the --xattrs flag does
